name: splynek
title: Splynek
description: Control the Splynek macOS download manager from Raycast.
author: splynek

commands.name: download
commands.title: Download URL with Splynek
commands.description: Start a new download for the URL on your clipboard.

commands.name: queue
commands.title: Queue URL in Splynek
commands.description: Append the URL on your clipboard to Splynek's queue.

commands.name: status
commands.title: Splynek Downloads
commands.description: Live list of active Splynek downloads.
